description.value: A bank of fog billows out from the point you designate. The fog obscures all sight, including darkvision, beyond 5 feet. A creature within 5 feet has concealment (attacks have a 20% miss chance). Creatures farther away have total concealment (50% miss chance, and the attacker can’t use sight to locate the target). A moderate wind (11+ mph) disperses the fog in 4 rounds; a strong wind (21+ mph) disperses the fog in 1 round. The spell does not function underwater. By the way… The effects created by this spell do not move with a vehicle. Mythic Fog Cloud The radius of the fog increases to 50 feet. Augmented (3rd): If you expend two uses of mythic power, the fogâs radius changes to 500 feet, and its height changes to 100 feet. Winds canât dissipate the fog unless the area of the wind affects the entire area of the augmented mythic fog cloud. If youâre at least 6th tier and instead expend three uses of mythic power, the range increases to 1 mile, the fogâs radius changes to 1 mile, and its height changes to 500 feet. The cloud is as resistant to wind as the 3rd-tier augmented version.
